name: Conventional commit message
description: Write a clear Conventional Commits message for the staged change.
rules: Use a Conventional Commits prefix: feat, fix, docs, refactor, test, chore, etc.
Subject line in the imperative mood, <= 72 characters, no trailing period.
Explain the why in the body when the change isn't obvious.
steps: Review the staged diff to understand the change.
Pick the type (feat/fix/docs/...) and an optional scope.
Write `type(scope): summary` as the subject line.
Add a body explaining motivation and any trade-offs.
author: lectern
